variants.title: Fleetguard AF25055 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P778124
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25055 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P778124
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25055 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Primary Round, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 99.95%, Outer Diameter: 234.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 123.0 mm, Length: 381.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.95%, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.title: Donaldson P778124 Air Filter, Primary Round
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P778124 Air Filter, Primary Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P778124 Air Filter, Primary Round is crafted to provide outstanding engine protection by filtering out dust, dirt, and debris before they reach the combustion chamber. Its round design maximizes airflow while maintaining exceptional filtration efficiency, supporting better fuel economy and engine performance. Perfect for trucks, heavy machinery, and industrial equipment, this filter is built to withstand harsh conditions. Its durable construction extends service intervals, reducing maintenance frequency and ensuring long-lasting engine health.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Primary Round, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 99.95%, Outer Diameter: 234.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 123.0 mm, Length: 381.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.95%, Media Type: Cellulose
